description: Restructure 3 omnibus blog articles into 20 individual articles + 3 hub pages. Add type/hub frontmatter support to lib/blog.ts and hub-article relationship UI to blog article pages.

userStories.title: Add type/hub fields to ArticleMeta + filter/query functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ArticleMeta to support type and hub fields, getLatestArticles to exclude hubs, and a new getArticlesByHub function, so that hub/cluster relationships work in code.
acceptanceCriteria: ArticleMeta has type: string and hub: string fields
parseArticleFile extracts type (default 'article') and hub (default '')
getLatestArticles filters out type === 'hub'
getArticlesByHub(hubSlug) returns articles sorted by date
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Added type/hub to ArticleMeta, filter in getLatestArticles, new getArticlesByHub function

userStories.title: Hub-article relationship banner in blog article page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to see a banner at the bottom of individual articles linking to the parent hub and sibling articles, so I can discover related content.
acceptanceCriteria: Articles with hub field show a relationship banner at bottom
Banner links to parent hub page
Banner lists sibling articles from same hub
Hub pages themselves do NOT show the banner
Lint passes
userStories.notes: HubBanner async component fetches siblings via getArticlesByHub, renders only for type !== hub

userStories.title: Create 6 Mars individual articles
userStories.description: As a reader, I want 6 focused articles covering March 2026 Belgian real estate topics, so each topic ranks independently.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 markdown files created with correct naming (2026-03-01 to 2026-03-06)
Each has proper frontmatter (type: article, hub: essentiel-immo-mars-2026)
Each is 800-1500 words with H1/H2/H3 hierarchy
Each has sources section and Seido CTA
Internal cross-links present
userStories.notes: 6 articles created (1100-1300 words each), all with proper frontmatter, cross-links, sources

userStories.title: Create Mars hub page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want a monthly index page for March 2026 linking to all 6 individual articles.
acceptanceCriteria: 2026-03-00-essentiel-immo-mars-2026.md created
Frontmatter has type: hub, category: L'essentiel immo
~400 words with summaries and links to all 6 articles
Checklist du mois section present
userStories.notes: Hub page with 6 article summaries, checklist, CTA

Each has sources section and Seido CTA
userStories.notes: 8 articles created (1150-1500 words each), expanded content with FAQ, tables, action guides

userStories.title: Delete 3 original omnibus articles
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove the 3 original digest articles to avoid duplicate content.
acceptanceCriteria: 2026-01-panorama-immobilier-belgique-janvier-2026.md deleted
2026-02-immobilier-belgique-fevrier-2026.md deleted
2026-03-immobilier-belgique-mars-2026.md deleted
No broken references remain
userStories.notes: 3 omnibus files deleted, fixed 14 broken hub links in new articles (old slug → essentiel-immo-*)
